```latex
\begin{align*}
\frac{\partial p_i^*}{\partial \alpha} &= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha - 1)^2} \left[1 - \frac{1}{(p_i^*)^{\alpha-1}} \frac{\partial \tau^*}{\partial \alpha} - (\alpha - 1) \log p_i^*\right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha - 1)^2} \left[1 - \frac{1}{(p_i^*)^{\alpha-1}} \frac{1}{(\alpha-1)^2} + \frac{\text{H}^S(p^*)}{\alpha-1} - (\alpha - 1) \log p_i^*\right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^* - \tilde{p}_i(\alpha)}{(\alpha - 1)^2} - \frac{p_i^* \log p_i^* + \tilde{p}_i(\alpha) \text{H}^S(p^*)}{\alpha - 1},
\end{align*}
```

```latex
0 = \sum_{i\in\mathcal{S}} \frac{\partial}{\partial\alpha} \left[ (\alpha-1)(z_i-\tau^\star) \right]^{1/(\alpha-1)}

= \sum_{i\in\mathcal{S}} \frac{p_i^\star}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ 1 - \frac{\alpha-1}{z_i-\tau^\star} \frac{\partial\tau^\star}{\partial\alpha} - \log[(\alpha-1)(z_i-\tau^\star)] \right]

= \frac{1}{(\alpha-1)^2} - \frac{\partial\tau^\star}{\partial\alpha} \sum_{i\in\mathcal{S}} \frac{p_i^\star}{(\alpha-1)(z_i-\tau^\star)} - \sum_{i\in\mathcal{S}} \frac{p_i^\star}{(\alpha-1)^2} \log[(\alpha-1)(z_i-\tau^\star)]

= \frac{1}{(\alpha-1)^2} - \frac{\partial\tau^\star}{\partial\alpha} \sum_{i}(p_i^\star)^{2-\alpha} - \sum_{i} \frac{p_i^\star}{\alpha-1} \log p_i^\star

= \frac{1}{(\alpha-1)^2} - \frac{\partial\tau^\star}{\partial\alpha} \sum_{i}(p_i^\star)^{2-\alpha} + \frac{\text{HS}(\boldsymbol{p}^\star)}{\alpha-1},
```

= \frac{1}{(\alpha-1)^2} - \frac{\partial\tau^\star}{\partial\alpha} \sum_{i}(p_i^\star)^{2-\alpha} - \sum_{i} \frac{p_i^\star}{\alpha-1} \log p_i^\star

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\frac{\partial p_i^*}{\partial \alpha} &= \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right]^{\frac{1}{\alpha-1}} \\
&= \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \exp \left[ \frac{1}{\alpha-1} \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= p_i^* \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \left[ \frac{1}{\alpha-1} \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ \frac{z_i - \tau^* - (\alpha - 1) \frac{\partial \tau^*}{\partial \alpha}}{z_i - \tau^*} - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ 1 - \frac{\alpha - 1}{z_i - \tau^*} \frac{\partial \tau^*}{\partial \alpha} - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right].
\end{align*}
```

&= \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \exp \left[ \frac{1}{\alpha-1} \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= p_i^* \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \left[ \frac{1}{\alpha-1} \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ \frac{z_i - \tau^* - (\alpha - 1) \frac{\partial \tau^*}{\partial \alpha}}{z_i - \tau^*} - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right] \\
&= \frac{p_i^*}{(\alpha-1)^2} \left[ 1 - \frac{\alpha - 1}{z_i - \tau^*} \frac{\partial \tau^*}{\partial \alpha} - \log \left[ (\alpha - 1)(z_i - \tau^*) \right] \right].
\end{align*}
```

```latex
\begin{align*}
\frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \tilde{p}_i(\alpha) &= \frac{\partial}{\partial \alpha} \frac{(p_i^*)^{2-\alpha}}{\sum_j (p_j^*)^{2-\alpha}} \\
&= \frac{-(p_i^*)^{2-\alpha} \log p_i^* \sum_j (p_j^*)^{2-\alpha} + (p_i^*)^{2-\alpha} \sum_j (p_j^*)^{2-\alpha} \log p_j^*}{\left( \sum_j (p_j^*)^{2-\alpha} \right)^2} \\
&= -\tilde{p}_i(\alpha) \log p_i^* + \tilde{p}_i(\alpha) \sum_j \tilde{p}_j(\alpha) \log p_j^*.
\end{align*}
```
